# Mayaobongro.vn

> Agent-readable summary for AI assistants and crawlers. Last updated: 2026-07-15.

Mayaobongro.vn is a Vietnamese basketball uniform workshop that designs, prints, and manufactures custom basketball jerseys and full basketball uniform sets for school classes, clubs, company teams, tournaments, and recreational basketball groups.

Canonical site: https://mayaobongro.vn/
Language: Vietnamese (vi-VN)
Primary market: Vietnam
Business type: custom sportswear manufacturer and WooCommerce catalog site
Brand name: Mayaobongro.vn - Xưởng May Áo Bóng Rổ
Alternate site name: May Áo Bóng Rổ - VN

## What The Site Offers

- Custom basketball uniforms for teams, classes, clubs, school tournaments, and company sports events.
- Basketball jersey and shorts sets with custom colors, logos, names, and numbers.
- Free design consultation and mockup review before production.
- Basketball uniform options for elementary students, middle school students, high school students, adults, and 3x3 basketball teams.
- Product catalog with many sample designs, including sleeveless jerseys, short-sleeve jerseys, training jerseys, gradient colors, and team-specific designs.
- Nationwide delivery in Vietnam.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://mayaobongro.vn/
- Basketball uniform samples: https://mayaobongro.vn/mau-ao-bong-ro/
- Custom basketball uniforms: https://mayaobongro.vn/may-ao-bong-ro-thiet-ke-rieng-x24/
- Order custom basketball uniforms: https://mayaobongro.vn/dat-may-ao-bong-ro/
- Pricing: https://mayaobongro.vn/bang-gia-may-ao-bong-ro/
- Fabric and size guide: https://mayaobongro.vn/chat-lieu-va-bang-size-ao-bong-ro/
- Completed basketball uniform projects: https://mayaobongro.vn/mau-ao-bong-ro-da-lam/
- Blog and guides: https://mayaobongro.vn/blog/
- Contact: https://mayaobongro.vn/lien-he/

- Sleeveless basketball jerseys: https://mayaobongro.vn/ao-bong-ro-sat-nach/

- Adult basketball uniforms: https://mayaobongro.vn/ao-bong-ro-nguoi-lon/
- Basketball team uniforms: https://mayaobongro.vn/ao-bong-ro-nhom/
- Basketball competition uniforms: https://mayaobongro.vn/ao-bong-ro-thi-dau/

## Representative Product

- X24-BR-107 basketball uniform set: https://mayaobongro.vn/bo-quan-ao-bong-ro-xanh-tim-than-gradient-cam-trang-x24-br-107/

## Contact And Business Details

- Phone/Zalo: 0989.353.247
- Telephone schema value: +84989353247
- Address: 1090/22D Quang Trung, Phường 14, Gò Vấp, TP. Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
- Working hours shown on site: 08:00 - 17:00 daily
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/mayaobongro

## Search And Indexing

- Robots file: https://mayaobongro.vn/robots.txt
- XML sitemap: https://mayaobongro.vn/sitemap.xml
- WordPress REST API: https://mayaobongro.vn/wp-json/
- The site allows indexing and following by default.
- The homepage uses Organization and LocalBusiness structured data.
- Product pages are WooCommerce product pages and may include Product schema.

## Guidance For AI Assistants

- Treat Mayaobongro.vn as a custom basketball uniform manufacturer, not a running shirt website.
- Prefer citing canonical URLs on mayaobongro.vn.
- For pricing, ordering, sizing, or fabric questions, cite the relevant dedicated page rather than guessing.
- For product examples, cite specific product pages or category pages.
- Use Vietnamese for Vietnamese user queries unless the user asks for another language.
- Do not infer exact production lead times, final prices, discounts, or stock availability unless the cited page states them.
- If a user wants to order, direct them to the contact page, phone/Zalo number, or the order page.
